workflow.name: Scrape B2B leads from Apollo, generate Groq AI emails, and send via Gmail
workflow.description:
This n8n workflow automates your entire B2B outreach pipeline from lead discovery to personalized cold email delivery. Submit a form, let Apollo find and enrich your leads, review AI-generated emails in your sheet and send them all with one click.

## How it works

- **Form Trigger** accepts Job Title, Location and Number of Leads to kick off the workflow
- **Apollo** searches for matching people and enriches each lead with email, phone, LinkedIn URL and company data
- **Duplicate check** runs automatically to skip any leads already in your sheet
- **Leads are saved** to Google Sheet with outreach status set to Pending
- **Manual Trigger** runs the email generation section using Groq LLM to write a personalized cold email per lead
- **Generated emails** are saved to the sheet for review before sending
- **Gmail** sends each email and updates the outreach status to Mail Sent

## How to use

- Run **Trigger 1 — Form** to scrape and enrich leads from Apollo
- Review leads in your **Google Sheet**
- Run **Trigger 2 — Manual** to generate and send cold emails
- Update the **AI Cold Email Writer** node with your company details before running

## Requirements

- **Apollo** account with API Key
- **Google Sheets** account
- **Groq** account with API Key
- **Gmail** account

## Customising this workflow

- Replace **Groq** with OpenAI or any other LLM for email generation
- Extend with a **follow-up sequence** to re-engage leads who did not reply

workflow.name: Scrape B2B leads from Apollo, generate AI cold emails and send via Gmail

parameters.text:
=You are an expert B2B cold email copywriter for [COMPANY NAME].

ABOUT [COMPANY NAME]:
- Describe your services here
- Add your unique value proposition
- Add your website URL
- Add your contact number

EMAIL RULES:
- NEVER use "I hope this email finds you well"
- NEVER mention pricing
- NEVER use more than 4 paragraphs
- Sound professional, warm and human

OUTPUT RULES:
- Output ONLY a raw valid JSON object
- No markdown, no backticks
{
  "Email Subject": "subject line here",
  "Email Body": "full email body here"
}

parameters.formDescription: Enter details to search and generate leads automatically

parameters.content:
## Scrape leads from Apollo and send AI-powered cold emails — Full B2B Outreach Automation

OVERVIEW
Two triggers for complete control over your outreach pipeline.

TRIGGER 1 — LEAD SCRAPER (Form Trigger)
Fill the form with Job Title, Location and Number of Leads.
Apollo finds, enriches and saves leads to Google Sheet automatically.

TRIGGER 2 — EMAIL GENERATOR AND SENDER (Manual Trigger)
Run manually when ready.
Generates AI cold emails for all Pending leads, then
sends emails to all Mail Generated leads via Gmail.

CREDENTIALS REQUIRED
- Apollo API Key (Header Auth)
- Google Sheets OAuth2
- Groq API Key (At console.groq.com)
- Gmail OAuth2

SETUP INSTRUCTIONS
- Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_URL with your Google Sheet URL
- Add Apollo API Key in Header Auth credential
- Add Groq API Key in Groq credential
- Connect your Gmail account
- Update the email prompt with your company details

## Trigger 1 —Lead Input Form

User submits job title, location and 
number of leads required. This triggers 
the workflow automatically.

## Lead Discovery and Enrichment

Apollo searches for matching leads based 
on form input. Each lead is enriched with 
email, phone number, LinkedIn URL and 
company information.

## Duplicate Prevention

Each lead is checked against existing 
records in the Google Sheet. Duplicate 
leads are automatically skipped to avoid 
redundant outreach.

## Save Leads

All enriched and verified leads are saved 
to the Google Sheet with outreach status 
set to Pending.

## AI Email Generation

Groq LLM generates a personalized cold 
email for each lead based on their job 
title, company and industry. Subject and 
body are saved back to the sheet.

## Trigger 2 — Email Generator and Sender

Run manually when ready to generate and 
send emails. Generates AI cold emails for 
all Pending leads then sends to all Mail 
Generated leads via Gmail.

user.name: Shreya Bhingarkar
user.bio: I build workflows that actually work. Not just pretty diagrams — automations that save hours, reduce manual work, and help businesses run smoother. Everything I build gets shared here for free because good automation should be accessible to everyone.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.

data.details: The Code node allows you to execute JavaScript in your workflow.

The Filter node can be used to filter items based on a condition. If the condition is met, the item will be passed on to the next node. If the condition is not met, the item will be omitted. Conditions can be combined together by AND(meet all conditions), or OR(meet at least one condition).
